prompt: Create a realistic stylish lifestyle photograph of a young woman seated at a rustic wooden table in a cozy café, wearing a fitted maroon short-sleeve top, a high-waisted cream midi skirt with button-down detail and tiny floral print, maroon ankle-strap heels, small gold hoop earrings, a gold wristwatch, and a matching maroon hair bow. She sits sideways on a bentwood café chair with elegant posture, one hand resting near a small cup and saucer on the table, legs crossed slightly to show the midi skirt and heels. Place a structured maroon handbag with top handles on the tabletop to her left. Her long dark wavy hair is half pulled back with the bow, and her face should look natural and realistic, softly lit and flattering. The café interior is warm and inviting, with bookshelves, a glowing floor lamp, wall art, wooden chairs, and several softly blurred patrons in the background. Use shallow depth of field, natural window light from the right, warm ambient lighting, realistic skin tones, editorial fashion photography composition, full-body seated framing, 1:1 square crop, no text or watermark.
